{{Quote|Couldn't help this, I suppose. At least this time you've a good excuse. Rash, undisciplined. There's no room for heroes in this corp. How many times have I told you that?|Obersken scolds Jagged Fel|<ref name="RSBF" />}}
'''Obersken''' was an elderly,<ref name="RSBF" /> muscular<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|402|Obersken}}</ref> [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] and the [[Empire of the Hand]] as the chief [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] of the [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy]] on the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> During many of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] cadet [[Jagged Fel]]'s flights aboard his<ref name="RSBF" /> [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|''Nssis''-class Clawcraft]] ''[[Blue Flame]]'', the mechanic told Fel that the Chiss needed no heroes while scolding him for his rashness. During a flight exercise<ref name="RSBF" /> in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Red Sky, Blue Flame]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> Fel crashed the ''Blue Flame'', and Obersken rescued him with a bright [[Color/Legends|red]] vehicle before scolding him. The chief mechanic had white [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="RSBF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Obersken appeared in the [[2001]] short story ''[[Red Sky, Blue Flame]]'', which was written by [[Elaine Cunningham]] and published within the [[Star Wars Gamer 7|seventh]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine.<ref name="RSBF" />
